title: lepisorus alberti
intro: Lepisorus alberti, also known as Albert's lepidosorus, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Lepisorus alberti include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to be beneficial in reducing fever and treating various health conditions. Lepisorus alberti can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
